cleavage agent: Proteolytic enzymes – trypsin, endoproteinase LysC or endoproteinase GluC
fractionation method: The urine was initially analysed by 1D SDS-PAGE
fragmentation method: fragmented in the octopole collision cell by high energy collisional dissociation (HCD)
instrument: coupled to a QExactive mass spectrometer
ionization type: mass spectrometer fitted with an electrospray source
labeling: urine samples were obtained from 24 (14 male, 10 female) M. murinus and from 13 (8 male, 5 female) M. lehilahytsara
reduction reagent: the gel plugs were then reduced in dithiothreitol (10 mM)
